project: DSAI3202 - Predicting Crime Types by Location and Time-Series Data

columns.name: ID
columns.description: Unique numeric identifier for each crime record assigned by Chicago PD.
columns.notes: Not used as a model feature.

columns.name: Case Number
columns.description: Chicago Police Department case number (e.g. JG423596).
columns.notes: Deduplicated in ETL Step 2 - first occurrence kept.

columns.name: Date
columns.description: Timestamp of crime occurrence. Raw format: MM/DD/YYYY HH:MM:SS AM/PM (Chicago CT).
columns.notes: Parsed to datetime64 in ETL Step 5. Source of all temporal features in Task 5.

columns.name: Block
columns.description: Anonymized block-level address of the crime (e.g. 073XX S JEFFERY AVE).
columns.notes: Nulls filled with UNKNOWN in ETL Step 4. Not used as a model feature.

columns.name: IUCR
columns.description: Illinois Uniform Crime Reporting code - 4-character crime classification code.
columns.notes: Nulls filled with UNKNOWN in ETL Step 4.

columns.name: Primary Type
columns.description: High-level crime category (e.g. THEFT, BATTERY, ASSAULT). This is the classification TARGET variable.
columns.notes: Standardized to UPPERCASE in ETL Step 5. 8 rare types (< 500 occurrences) merged into OTHER in ETL Step 8: PUBLIC INDECENCY, NON-CRIMINAL, OTHER NARCOTIC VIOLATION, HUMAN TRAFFICKING, NON - CRIMINAL, RITUALISM, NON-CRIMINAL (SUBJECT SPECIFIED), DOMESTIC VIOLENCE. Final unique count: 29 classes.

columns.name: Description
columns.description: Subcategory description of the crime under Primary Type (e.g. SIMPLE, AGGRAVATED).
columns.notes: Nulls filled with UNKNOWN in ETL Step 4.

columns.name: Location Description
columns.description: Type of location where crime occurred (e.g. STREET, RESIDENCE, APARTMENT).
columns.notes: 5,873 nulls filled with UNKNOWN in ETL Step 4. Candidate feature in Task 5.

columns.name: Arrest
columns.description: True if an arrest was made in connection with this crime.
columns.notes: Cast to bool in ETL Step 5. EXCLUDED from model features - post-incident field that would introduce target leakage into the classifier.

columns.name: Domestic
columns.description: True if the crime was classified as a domestic incident under the Illinois Domestic Violence Act.
columns.notes: Cast to bool in ETL Step 5. Candidate feature in Task 5.

columns.name: Beat
columns.description: Chicago Police Department patrol beat - the smallest geographic unit of policing.
columns.notes: Nulls filled with 0 in ETL Step 4. Candidate geospatial feature in Task 5.

columns.name: District
columns.description: Chicago Police Department district number (1-25) grouping multiple beats.
columns.notes: 48 nulls filled with 0 in ETL Step 4.

columns.name: Ward
columns.description: Chicago City Council ward number (1-50). Administrative/political subdivision.
columns.notes: 614,820 nulls (8.32%) filled with 0 in ETL Step 4. High null rate documented.

columns.name: Community Area
columns.description: Chicago community area number (1-77). Stable socioeconomic neighbourhood boundaries.
columns.notes: 613,469 nulls (8.30%) filled with 0 in ETL Step 4. Key geospatial feature candidate - encodes neighbourhood context.

columns.name: FBI Code
columns.description: FBI Uniform Crime Reporting classification code for the offense.
columns.notes: Nulls filled with UNKNOWN in ETL Step 4.

columns.name: X Coordinate
columns.description: Illinois State Plane East coordinate in feet (NAD 1927 projection).
columns.notes: 74,115 nulls (1.00%). Not used as feature - Latitude/Longitude used instead.

columns.name: Y Coordinate
columns.description: Illinois State Plane North coordinate in feet (NAD 1927 projection).
columns.notes: 74,115 nulls (1.00%). Not used as feature - Latitude/Longitude used instead.

columns.name: Year
columns.description: Year the crime occurred (2001-2024). Extracted from Date by Chicago PD system.
columns.notes: Redundant with Date column but pre-extracted. Range confirmed: 2001-2024.

columns.name: Updated On
columns.description: Timestamp of the last update to this record in the Chicago data portal.
columns.notes: Not used as a feature. Parsed to datetime64 in ETL Step 5.

columns.name: Latitude
columns.description: WGS84 decimal latitude of crime location. Valid range after ETL: 41.64459 to 42.02291.
columns.notes: 74,115 rows dropped in ETL Step 3 (missing). Bounding box applied: [41.60, 42.05]. IQR filter applied: [41.56198, 42.11372] - 0 additional removed. Core spatial feature for prediction.

columns.name: Longitude
columns.description: WGS84 decimal longitude of crime location. Valid range after ETL: -87.84190 to -87.52453.
columns.notes: IQR filter applied: [-87.84190, -87.50010] - 33,758 outliers removed in ETL Step 9. Core spatial feature for prediction.

columns.name: Location
columns.description: Combined string representation of coordinates in format (latitude, longitude).
columns.notes: 74,115 nulls (1.00%). Redundant with Latitude/Longitude columns - not used as feature.
